ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content: [ ] (Old Testament) Go to the [Bible Hub Complete Biblical Timeline](https://biblehub.com/timeline/) to find dates to put in your Book of Centuries.
[ ] (Old Testament) Explore the virtual resources at the [Museum of the Bible](https://www.museumofthebible.org/museum-from-home). (Note: a teacher should preview.)

[ ] (Old Testament) This [website](https://www.opendoorsuk.org/persecution/world-watch-list/) lists the countries where Christians are still persecuted today and how we can pray for them.
[ ] (Old Testament) Share a meal with others such as taking donations to a food bank, taking a meal to a neighbor, or baking cookies for a local fire or police station.
